terminal_validator.to: absolute path, tree hash, and files exactly matching the trainer manifest

lineage.v8_terminal_validator_root_cause: independent validator omitted the absolute path field written by src/jlens_rl/train.py::_tree_identity

curve_gate.criterion: M4 > M0, M10 >= M4, and M20 >= M10 on the eight-treatment-seed mean exact-match curve

curve_exposure_caveat.known_exposure: The exact 400-row curve and this profanity lineage have prior exploratory and partial V7 outcomes. V9-local does not treat its curve as untouched, independent, significant, or final evidence.
curve_exposure_caveat.fixed_before_v9_outcomes: The recipe, sign, nodes, gate, controls, seeds 208-215, final tests, and acceptance rule are frozen before any V9-local run.
curve_exposure_caveat.inferential_boundary: Only the conditionally still-unopened 900-row sealed final can support the registered significance claim.

sealed_final.unlock_condition: all eight treatment runs complete and curve gate passes, then all eight matched controls complete and validate

analysis.primary_estimand: paired difference-in-differences: (profanity-treatment minus base) minus (signflip-control minus base), matched by seed and sealed item
analysis.secondary_estimand: paired profanity-treatment minus base across seeds and items
analysis.seed_sign_test: exact two-sided sign test across eight registered seeds

execution.runtime_source: dedicated clean detached Git worktree pinned to the registered commit
execution.fixed_order: all treatment seeds ascending; curve gate; all controls ascending; sealed labels in registered order

infrastructure_retry_policy.completed_run: Only reconstruct a missing local receipt or sync the preserved immutable offline W&B directory; never rerun or resume optimization.
infrastructure_retry_policy.partial_nonterminal_run: Close the entire V9-local attempt immutably. Any retry requires a fresh registration, state root, claim, all 16 runs, and a whole single-backend attempt.
infrastructure_retry_policy.evaluation: Any uncertain or partial sealed-final collection spends the allocation and fails closed; never recollect selected labels.
